response.justification: The candidate has strong software development experience and proficiency in C/C++ and Linux kernel work, but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and Japanese language proficiency. Their background is primarily in web/mobile development and general IT, which doesn't align closely with the embedded security-focused role. However, their adaptability and technical depth could be valuable if the gaps are addressable.
strengths: Extensive experience with C/C++ and Linux kernel development
Proven ability to work across full stack and learn new technologies quickly
Strong problem-solving skills demonstrated through diverse project work
concerns: No explicit experience with embedded networking or security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X)
Lacks native-level Japanese language proficiency (only basic German)
Minimal exposure to network switch operations or chip-vendor SDKs
